response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to agentic workflows at Stripe, but lacks demonstrable leadership in scaling AI systems in regulated fintech, has no clear track record in multi-agent architecture design or financial infrastructure, and his executive leadership experience is unverified — notably, his self-described 'Founder, Datadog' appears to be a misstatement or confusion with the real company.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI infrastructure at Stripe via MCP frameworks
Proven backend and distributed systems experience with high-throughput systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech or credit/risk domains
Claimed 'Founder, Datadog' is factually incorrect and raises red flags about credibility
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or governing hybrid external engineering models
